description: Neo4j graph database schema for California wildfire causation data

properties.name: name
properties.description: Fire name (e.g. Camp Fire, Palisades Fire)

properties.name: county
properties.description: California county where the fire started

properties.name: directCause
properties.description: Specific cause (e.g. Power line failure, Campfire)

properties.name: directCauseCategory
properties.description: Cause category (e.g. Electrical, Human, Arson, Natural, Under investigation)

nodes.label: ContributingFactor
nodes.description: Conditions that caused or worsened fires

properties.name: name
properties.description: Factor name (e.g. Drought, Santa Ana Winds, High Wind, Low Humidity)

nodes.label: SpreadMechanism
nodes.description: How fires spread to structures and new areas

properties.name: name
properties.description: Mechanism name (e.g. Flying Ember, Spot Fire, Pyrocumulonimbus)

nodes.label: PropertyVulnerability
nodes.description: Home features that increase ignition risk

properties.name: name
properties.description: Vulnerability name (e.g. Debris-filled gutters, Unprotected vents)

relationships.description: What caused or worsened the fire

returnClause: RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Which fires were spread by flying embers?
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[r:HAS_DOCUMENTED_SPREAD_MECHANISM]->(s:SpreadMechanism {name: 'Flying Ember'})
WITH f, collect(s) AS mechs
MATCH (f)-[r]->(n)
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Show fires contributed to by Santa Ana Winds
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[:CONTRIBUTED_BY]->(c:ContributingFactor {name: 'Santa Ana Winds'})
WITH f
MATCH (f)-[r]->(n)
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Fires that burned more than 100000 acres
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[r]->(n) WHERE f.acresBurned >= 100000
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Fires in Los Angeles county
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[r]->(n) WHERE f.county = 'Los Angeles'
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: What caused the Palisades Fire?
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire {name: 'Palisades Fire'})-[r]->(n)
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Fires from 2020 to 2025
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[r]->(n) WHERE f.year >= 2020 AND f.year <= 2025
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId

examples.question: Fires linked to drought
examples.cypher:
MATCH (f:Fire)-[:CONTRIBUTED_BY]->(c:ContributingFactor {name: 'Drought'})
WITH f
MATCH (f)-[r]->(n)
RETURN f AS Fire, type(r) AS rel, labels(n)[0] AS targetLabel, n AS target, elementId(f) AS fId, elementId(n) AS nId
